_note: Each word has a 5D affinity vector [0-1]. Player choices accumulate affinity; at emergence, cosine similarity determines their word.

echo.power: copy any word you touch — but lose a fragment each time

bloom.power: heal yourself and others — but you can't stop growing

rust.power: decay anything you touch — weapons, armor, walls

whisper.power: speak to the root network — hear secrets

fractal.power: split into copies — each weaker than the last

tide.power: push and pull — nothing stays where you don't want it

ember.power: burn slow and steady — you outlast everything

crystal.power: see the truth — illusions shatter around you

thread.power: connect things — pull the web, feel vibrations

storm.power: overwhelming force — but you can't aim

silence.power: nullify any word near you — including allies

pulse.power: sense life around you — find hidden things

mirror.power: reflect attacks — but also reflect your own pain

bone.power: unbreakable — you endure what no one else can

seed.power: potential — you grow stronger with every encounter

light.power: illuminate — darkness retreats but you're always visible

shadow.power: invisible — strike unseen but sunlight hurts you
